title: Subtitle-Highlight-Unofficial-reset
description: Add samples to distinguish different subtitles, while providing custom settings for individual subtitles.
body:
# Subtitle-Highlight-Unofficial-reset
Minecraft 1.21.11 Unofficial Reset Version

## Original Project Information
- Original Mod: Subtitle Highlight - https://www.mcmod.cn/class/8183.html
- Original Author: Yeah-Zero
- License: GNU LGPLv3

## Project Description
This project is an **unofficial reset version**, adapted for Minecraft 1.21.11 with compatibility fixes, **without modifying the core functionality of the original mod**. More new features and version adaptations will be added in the future.  
This project fully inherits the original mod's **GNU LGPLv3** open-source license.

## Changes
- Adapted for Minecraft 1.21.11 Fabric
- Retains all original author copyrights and functional logic
- Configuration file renamed to `shur.json`
- Added command system: supports `/shur` command for configuration management
- Added mod API: provides `SubtitleAPI` for other mods to extend functionality
- Performance optimization: frustum culling, object pool pattern
- Data-driven configuration: supports custom subtitle colors via data packs
- Configuration sharing: supports configuration export/import
- Hotkey feature: supports quick adjustment of subtitle settings

## Open Source License
This project is released under the **GNU Lesser General Public License v3.0**.  
You are free to use, modify, and distribute it, but you must:  
1. Preserve the copyright notices of the original author and the reset author.  
2. Distribute modified versions with source code publicly available and continue using LGPLv3.  
3. Not restrict users from replacing or modifying this mod.
